basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitmandi.ac.in. Has been announced through the IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M. Sc in Physical Sciences. Valid GATE or NET or any other valid national test qualification is required for JRF. Desirable: Experience in working in experimental condensed matter physics laboratory.

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible candidates Offline/Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Mandi is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Sc degree in Physical Sciences and have a valid GATE or NET or any other valid national test qualification to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the desirable qualification for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Experience in working in an experimental condensed matter physics laboratory is considered desirable for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an offline or online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project end date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The project end date for the position is 30th March 2031.
